query: ("cool roof" OR "green roof" OR "living roof" OR "vegetated roof" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "high-albedo roof" OR "roof cooling" OR "rooftop intervention" OR "building envelope" OR "cooling intervention" OR "building retrofit" OR "green infrastructure" OR "cool coating" OR "thermochromic roof" OR "photovoltaic roof") AND ("urban heat island" OR temperature OR "thermal environment" OR "heat exposure" OR "ambient temperature" OR "surface temperature" OR microclimate OR "heat stress" OR "thermal comfort" OR "cooling effect") AND (health OR "heat-related illness" OR "thermal stress" OR cardiovascular OR respiratory OR mortality OR morbidity OR "public health" OR wellbeing OR "heat-related mortality" OR "temperature-related health") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR RCT OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "causal inference" OR "intervention study" OR "controlled trial" OR "experimental design" OR "impact evaluation" OR "program evaluation" OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR longitudinal) AND (urban OR city OR cities OR metropolitan OR residential OR commercial OR building)
